/usr/bin/ar cr ../../../lib/libbfd.a  CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/archive.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/archures.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/bfd.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/bfdio.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/bfdwin.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/cache.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/coffgen.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/corefile.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/format.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/init.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/libbfd.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/opncls.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/reloc.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/section.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/syms.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/hash.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/linker.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/srec.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/binary.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/tekhex.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/ihex.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/stabs.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/stab-syms.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/merge.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/dwarf2.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/simple.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/archive64.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/elf64-x86-64.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/elf64.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/elf.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/elflink.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/elf-strtab.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/elf-eh-frame.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/dwarf1.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/ipa_ld.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/ipa_cmdline.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/elf32-i386.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/elf-vxworks.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/elf32.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/i386linux.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/aout32.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/efi-app-ia32.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/cofflink.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/elf64-gen.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/elf32-gen.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/cpu-i386.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/targets.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/peigen.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/elf64-mips.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/elf32-mips.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/elfn32-mips.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/cpu-mips.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/elfxx-mips.c.o CMakeFiles/bfd.dir/ecofflink.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../../lib/libbfd.a
